sentences.sentence: Safety goggles are stored by the sink.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (goggles, sink)

sentences.sentence: Wash your hands before each experiment.
sentences.phonetic_focus: final consonant clusters (hands); basic vowel distinctions (each)

sentences.sentence: The eyewash station can be found near the exit.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound-noun stress (eyewash station); linking (can_be_found)

sentences.sentence: Spill kits are inspected automatically at the start of class.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (str- in start, -ts in kits); reduced syllables (automatically)

sentences.sentence: You will need protective gloves for the acid experiments.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words in rapid sequence (for the); final cluster (-nts in experiments)

sentences.sentence: The fume hood should be closed after each use.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound-noun stress (fume hood); linking (should_be)

sentences.sentence: If you are unsure how to handle a chemical, check the safety guide posted beside the main bench.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing across 18 words; reduced function words in rapid sequence (how to, a); conditional intonation

sentences.sentence: Paint supplies are located in aisle three.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (paint, three)

sentences.sentence: Grab a cart near the door.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (cart, door)

sentences.sentence: The garden tools can be found along the back wall.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound-noun stress (garden tools, back wall); linking (can_be_found)

sentences.sentence: Extra keys are cut automatically at the front counter.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound-noun stress (front counter); reduced syllables (automatically)

sentences.sentence: You will find electrical parts beside the paint section.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (-rts in parts); compound-noun stress (paint section)

sentences.sentence: Power drills can be tested near the tool rack.
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound-noun stress (power drills, tool rack); consonant cluster (-lls in drills)

sentences.sentence: If you cannot find a specific item, please check the store directory posted beside the main entrance.
sentences.phonetic_focus: conditional intonation pattern; final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries (item, entrance)

sentences.sentence: The dome theater is straight ahead.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (str- in straight)

sentences.sentence: Please dim your screens now.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (scr- in screens)

sentences.sentence: The star projector sits in the center of the room.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (str- in star); compound-noun stress (star projector)

sentences.sentence: Tonight's program runs through the most distant galaxies.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (runs_through); reduced syllables (galaxies)

sentences.sentence: Reclining seats are arranged automatically before every show.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in multi-syllable words (automatically); final cluster (-ts in seats)

sentences.sentence: The constellations can be viewed comfortably from any seat.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables (comfortably); consonant cluster (-nts in constellations); linking (can_be_viewed)

sentences.sentence: If you feel any dizziness during the show, please stay seated until the overhead lights return.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundaries (if you_feel); conditional intonation over 16 words
